description:
Integrating Gen-AI into applications at scales required Webex by Cisco to think differently to manage social responsibility, future use cases and responsiveness to new model development. Creating a Large Language Model (LLM) proxy enabled Webex to empower developers to embed Gen-AI in innovative ways into the Webex Suite of applications, quickly, securely and at scale.

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS​​​ cloud:
